title: CLOTHING BOUTIQUE - 211info
text: BEAUTIFUL SAVIOR LUTHERAN CHURCH CLOTHING BOUTIQUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers recycled clothing for people of all ages, including items suitable for work, interviews, and school. Appointments are limited to one per month. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 9am-noon. Additional hours available for those fostering a child. Email (503) 788-7000 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 788-7000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Resource Parents: Walk in to obtain clothing for foster children children placed in their care in emergency situations Others: Call and leave contact information. A respresentative will call you to set up a Wednsday appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon for clothing appointments Services: Children's Clothing * Foster Children General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
